system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee against Attack roll/Evade
Type: Counter
Qi: 1

You flick a number of caltrops into the air, where they suspend and twirl to redirect incoming projectiles. This can be used only against mundane Attacks (not against Kung Fu Techniques). Roll Light Melee against the Attack roll of the projectile. On a Success the weapon is spun by your caltrop and strikes the original attacker (provided your Light Melee roll beats their Evade as well). On a Total Success you can redirect the projectile at any target of your choice. Cathartic: When used Cathartically the caltrops remain suspended and in effect for one full round. It also works against Kung Fu Techniques when used in this manner. A priest leaps at his enemies with Swan Taming Strike.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically the caltrops remain suspended and in effect for one full round. It also works against Kung Fu Techniques when used in this manner. A priest leaps at his enemies with Swan Taming Strike.
